/usr/bin/clang++ --target=aarch64-none-elf -ffreestanding -nostdlib -mcpu=cortex-a72 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-stack-protector -mstrict-align -fno-pie -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-threadsafe-statics -fno-use-cxa-atexit -O3 -DNDEBUG -nostdlib -static --ld-path=/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ld -nostdlib -static -T /Users/stephen/git/viperdos/user/user.ld CMakeFiles/vedit.prg.dir/src/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/vedit.prg.dir/src/buffer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/vedit.prg.dir/src/editor.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/vedit.prg.dir/src/view.cpp.obj -o ../../vedit.prg  ../../libviperwidget.a ../../lib/libvipergui.a ../../lib/libviperlibc.a
